problem_solved: Fragmented data and processes across clinical trials, regulatory, and commercial operations in life sciences
solution_description: Cloud-based platform suite including Veeva Vault (CTMS, RIM, Safety, eTMF) for clinical/regulatory and Veeva CRM for commercial operations. Industry-standard platform connecting pharma companies with healthcare providers.
traction_signals: Vault platform adopted by 1000+ pharma companies
notes: The Salesforce of life sciences. Industry-specific cloud applications with deep regulatory compliance. Key competitor to Oracle Siebel in CRM space. Vault platform competes with Medidata in clinical.
